units.content: source tag takes a third predetermined value distinct from the first two values
third value indicates the record was produced by an automated actor performing an action on the target entity
each record whose source tag carries the third value further comprises one or more structured pointers
each structured pointer identifies a coupling entry in storage whose content was read by the automated actor
the action was conditioned upon the coupling entry content read prior to producing the action
storage records action records in the same six-field schema as records with first or second source tag values
